Hkkjkjkizk@13013@681@15&16@thlh&fo’kk[kkiRrue¼358&395½] yhuk uanu] la;qDr lfpo MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 9th May, 2016 S.O. 1682(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008 published vide G.S.R 838(E) dated 5th December, 2008 and subsequent amendments (the “said Rules”), the Central Government, vide notification S.O. 1709(E), dated 26th July, 2012 as amended vide Sr. No. 6 of Table 1 of fee notification bearing S.O. 896(E) dated 26.03.2014 have notified that there shall be levied and collected fees on mechanical vehicles for the use of four or more lane section from km 2.837 – km 0.000 and km 395.870 – km 358.000 (New Chainage from km 700.544 to km 741.255 (Visakhapatnam to Ankapalli Section) of National Highway No. 5 in the State of Andhra Pradesh (the “said section”), and has authorized the Authority to collect, either through its officials or through a contractor, the said fee. -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification S.O. 1709(E), dated 26th July, 2015 and Sr. No. 6 of Table 1 of fee notification bearing S.O. 896(E) dated 26.03.2014, namely:- 1. In the notification S.O. 1709(E), dated 26.07.2012, the existing para 1 of Notes:- The fee levied and collected ………………………………….. net road length specified for such Toll Plaza: S. No. Location of Toll Plaza (chainage) Length (in km) for which Fee is payable 1 Km/Ch. 371.200 (new chainage km 728.055) (near Village Agnampudi in Visakhapatnam District) 40.707 Shall be substituted as:- The fee levied and collected ………………………………….. net road length specified for such Toll Plaza: S. No. Location of Toll Plaza (chainage) Length (in km) for which Fee is payable 1 Km/Ch. 363.255 (new chainage km 736.000) [Salapuvanipalem (near Lankelapalem Village in Visakhapatnam District) 40.328 2. In the notification S.O. 896(E) dated 26.03.2014, the existing para 1 of Notes:- Table 1 S. No. Details of Fee Notification Name of Toll Plaza S.O. No. Date 6 1709(E) 26.07.2012 Aganampudi Shall be substituted as:- In addition to above, the following fee shall also be due and payable for the use of the following structures having length more than 60m at the following Toll Plaza(s), by converting the length of structures into an equivalent length of highway by multiplying the length of such structures by an equalization factor of 10: Location of Toll Plaza (chainage) Length of structures * (in km) to be converted into equivalent road length Equivalent Road length (in km) Rate at which fee is payable Km/Ch. 363.255 (new chainage km 736.000) [Salapuvanipalem (near Lankelapalem Village in Visakhapatnam District) 0.379 3.790 100% of the base rates mentioned in Table 1 above S. No. * Structure having length more than 60 m Chainage (Km.) Length (m) From To 1 716.730 716.829 99.000 727.505 727.605 100.000 739.686 739.776 90.000 740.611 740.701 90.000 Total 379.000 [F. No. NHAI/13013/681/15-16/GC-Visakhapatnam (358-395)] LEENA NANDAN, Jt. Secy.
